text: Code refactoring: Split ui.ts mega-store (2547 lines)
description:
ui.ts is too large, split into focused stores:
- navigation.ts: Column/phase selection, keyboard nav
- modals.ts: Modal state management
- graph.ts: Graph view state
- settings.ts: Project settings, preferences

Benefits: Better maintainability, clearer boundaries, easier testing

status.comment:
Refactoring COMPLETE! Final architecture:

**ui.ts: 3 lines** (compatibility export)

**4 Focused Stores:**
- list-store.ts: 363 lines (navigation, columns, selection)
- project-store.ts: 77 lines (path, connection, view state)
- modal-store.ts: 99 lines (modal state, teleport buffer)
- graph-store.ts: 55 lines (graph UI settings)

**6 Action Modules (complex business logic):**
- move-actions.ts: 738 lines
- keyboard-actions.ts: 396 lines
- selection-actions.ts: 247 lines
- navigation-actions.ts: 184 lines
- aim-actions.ts: 178 lines
- phase-actions.ts: 83 lines

**4 Helper Modules (pure functions + tests):**
- navigation-helpers.ts: 334 lines
- modal-helpers.ts: 112 lines
- view-helpers.ts: 78 lines
- project-helpers.ts: 53 lines

✅ No state duplication
✅ No delegation anti-patterns
✅ Clear boundaries
✅ Single responsibilities
✅ All tests pass (65/65)
✅ TypeScript clean

**Result: 85.7% reduction in main store (2547→363 lines)**
